chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1541 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6518/2023 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case 16.11.2023 Mr. Nusrat Hussain J. Memon, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition. Such statement filed by the petitioner, stating that impugned order dated 05.10.2023 issued by respondent No.2 has been cancelled. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
